titleStmt.title: SII 4.945: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 945. (A.R. No. 128 of 1893). ON ANOTHER PILLAR IN THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīramaṇiyu raṇavijayaśrīrama
ṇiyu niṁdukuṁdasitavipu
layaśaḥ śrīramaṇiyu variyiṁtturu
gōri kulōttuṁgacōḍa goṁkkanarēṁdruN [. 1*]
Āraya naṭṭigoṁkkanripu nanvayabhrityuṁḍḍu
viśvaśāsanaśrīramaṇiyyamai tanaraṁ jiṁttama
nāyaku ḍuddhariṁceṁ go . llūrivibhuṁḍu
vaṁśamahimonnatulanniyu nērppaḍaṁ brati
hāripadārtthapūrvvamuga nāravitārakaśā
sanaṁbugān [. 2*] Ataniki nagaṇyapuṇyavrataya
gu guṁḍamakuṁ buṭṭe vasumativīravratuṁ
ḍu vaḍihāri muttana hataśatrucayuṁ
ḍu nāyakābharaṇuṁḍai [. 3*] mura . haravikra
muṁḍaina muttanaku nnaralōka raṁbhanāṁ baragi
na maḍamāṁbaku śubhasthitiṁ buṭṭe manuṣyalō
kasuṁ . dariyana noppu nūṁkama latālali
tāṁggi sumadhyamamallikā laganthi mattapika
bhāṣiṇi gōtrapavitramai mahini [. 4*] śrīyuta
puṇyakīrttanalu sēkoni nūṁkama bhaktiṁ jōḍanārā
yaṇadivyasannidhiṁ jirasthiradīpamu nilpe
nāśakā . bdāyativēdaśailagaganābjamitaṁbuga
phālguṇāmalaśrīyuvatīśa sattithini (.)
jelvuga nāravitārakaṁbugānū [. 5*] śakavarṣa 1074
Agunēṁṭi pālguṇa śuddhadvādaśiyu sōmavā
ramunāṁḍu danadavrōli paḍyabōyini vre
nama koḍku gōkarājukaṁḍya yeṟyanabeṁ jōḍanā
rāyaṇadēvara sāni nūṁkama Akhaṁḍadīpamu
naku goṟiya 55 ṇṭikiṁ beṭṭina birudugadyalu
padāṟu vīniṁ jēkoni yaṟyana dana putrapautri
kamu nitya māneṁḍu neyi Ācaṁdrārkkamu
naḍapaṁggalavāru śrīśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 4.945 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
